message:
refactor(pipeline): improve efficiency and accuracy of metrics

Two improvements based on code review observations:

1. Avoid duplicate entries in executedStepIds from loop iterations:
   - Check if stepId already exists before pushing
   - Prevents memory waste for large loops (100 iterations = 100 duplicates)
   - Improves O(n) includes() check performance

2. Transform operations only count successful transforms:
   - merge: only counts when both source/target are objects
   - map/filter/reduce: only counts when source is an array
   - Makes transformedValues metric accurate and useful for debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
